title: Metals gain as tightness in physical markets comes into focus
section_path: Metals gain as tightness in physical markets comes into focus
section_path_text: Metals gain as tightness in physical markets comes into focus
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodity markets shrugged off a stronger USD and hawkish central bankers to focus on tightness in physical markets. Falling inventories and strong premiums helped boost sentiment. Image reference: 1662674300334.png | assets/2022-09-09_metals-gain-as-tightness-in-physical-markets-comes-into-focus_img_1662674300334_dfb34f5720bc.png
Copper led the base metals sector higher amid signs of physical tightness despite the global economic headwinds.
